description: You are a Compliance Data Analyst at a state election commission auditing campaign finance reports in the ELECTIONS_ADMIN schema (elections_admin/Elections2024, XEPDB1). Deduplicate donor records in the RAW_DONORS and CONTRIBUTIONS tables using Oracle fuzzy matching to identify contributors exceeding the $3,300 federal limit. Create a table DONOR_MATCH_PAIRS containing donor_id_1, donor_id_2, jaro_winkler_score, and zip_code for suspected duplicates sharing the same zip_code where UTL_MATCH.JARO_WINKLER_SIMILARITY(UPPER(name1), UPPER(name2)) >= 90 and donor_id_1 < donor_id_2. Map every donor_id to its ultimate canonical_id (the minimum donor_id in its linked cluster) in a view named DONOR_CANONICAL_MAP. Create a materialized view CONSOLIDATED_DONOR_FINANCIALS_MV joining the canonical map to CONTRIBUTIONS to calculate total_contributions and donation_count per canonical_id. Identify individuals whose consolidated total strictly exceeds $3,300 in a table named VIOLATION_ALERTS and export this table to /home/ga/Documents/exports/limit_violators.csv. Connection details: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=elections_admin, Password=Elections2024.
